title: PayPal Q3 2020 Earnings Preview
text: PayPal was scheduled to announce Q3 earnings results on November 2, 2020. The consensus EPS estimate was $0.94 (up 54.1% year-over-year) and revenue estimate was $5.41B (up 23.5% year-over-year). Analysts expected TPV of $232.26B. Over prior 2 years, PYPL had beaten EPS estimates 88% of the time and revenue estimates 63% of the time. When PayPal reported actual results, revenues grew 25.4% on FX-neutral basis to $5.46 billion, and non-GAAP EPS grew 41% to $1.07.
